quality_assessment.completeness: High. All expected fields for a spell entity are present.
quality_assessment.clarity: Good. The mechanical description, bonus action usage, environmental effects, and scaling are clearly articulated.
quality_assessment.formatting: Standard D&D 5e format, utilizing bolding for headers and italics for the 'At Higher Levels' section.

mechanics_review.core_mechanic: Area denial/controlled movement damage over time.
mechanics_review.action_economy: 1 Action to cast, Bonus Action to move/ram. Excellent resource utilization for a concentration spell.
mechanics_review.damage_scaling: Scales by 1d6 per slot level above 2nd. Standard and predictable.
interaction_notes: The range (60 feet) is standard for deployment.
The proximity damage (ends turn within 5 feet) encourages positioning opponents near it.
The bonus action ram provides direct engagement capability.
The environmental interaction (igniting objects, light emission) adds flavor and minor utility.
